svg.aria-label: team-composer — every role earns its seat
svg.title: team-composer — every role earns its seat
svg.desc: Pixel-art banner for the team-composer Claude Code plugin: five color-coded team members in a row with speech bubbles, two "zigzag" disagreement marks between them, a shielded (non-droppable) role, and a three-round process ribbon below representing Opening, Rebuttals, Synthesis.
